channel.title: Southwest Airlines on MinWeb
channel.description: Recent content in Southwest Airlines on MinWeb

item.title: Southwest Overhauls: Success Fuels Change
item.description: Southwest Airlines is undergoing a major transformation after record-breaking financial success; learn how these shifts impact your future travel experience.

item.title: Southwest's Biggest Change in 53 Years
item.description: Southwest Airlines is undergoing its biggest transformation in 53 years; discover what these major operational shifts mean for your future travel experience.
